name.description: Name is the alternative name for the package.

Alias.description: Alias represents an alternative name for a package.

enabled.description: Enabled controls whether building from source is allowed.

type.description: Type specifies the build method (go_install or go_build).

path.description: Path is the import path or directory for Go packages.

files.description: Files specifies which files to install after building.

excluded_envs.description: ExcludedEnvs lists environments where building should be skipped.

Build.description: Build defines configuration for building packages from source code.

features.description: Features is a list of specific features to enable when installing.

all_features.description: AllFeatures enables all available features for the package.

locked.description: Locked uses the exact versions from Cargo.lock file.

Cargo.description: Cargo defines configuration options for installing Rust packages via Cargo.

type.description: Type specifies where to download the checksum file from.

asset.description: Asset is the name of the checksum file asset (for github_release type).

url.description: URL is the direct URL to the checksum file (for http type).

file_format.description: FileFormat specifies the format of the checksum file.

algorithm.description: Algorithm specifies the hash algorithm used for checksums.

pattern.description: Pattern defines how to extract checksums from the checksum file.

enabled.description: Enabled controls whether checksum verification is active.

replacements.description: Replacements provides template replacements for checksum URLs/assets.

cosign.description: Cosign configuration for signature verification of checksums.

minisign.description: Minisign configuration for signature verification of checksums.

github_artifact_attestations.description: GitHubArtifactAttestations configuration for GitHub artifact attestation verification.

Checksum.description: Checksum defines configuration for verifying package integrity using checksums.

checksum.description: Checksum is a regex pattern to extract the checksum value.

file.description: File is a regex pattern to extract the filename (optional).

ChecksumPattern.description: ChecksumPattern defines regular expression patterns for extracting checksums from checksum files.

packages.description: PackageInfos contains all package definitions in the registry.

Config.description: Config represents a registry configuration containing package definitions.

enabled.description: Enabled controls whether Cosign verification is active.

opts.description: Opts contains additional command-line options to pass to cosign verify.

signature.description: Signature specifies where to download the signature file.

certificate.description: Certificate specifies where to download the certificate file.

key.description: Key specifies where to download the public key file.

bundle.description: Bundle specifies where to download the signature bundle.

Cosign.description: Cosign defines configuration for verifying packages using Cosign signature verification.

type.description: Type specifies the source type for downloading the file.

repo_owner.description: RepoOwner is the GitHub repository owner (for github_release type).

repo_name.description: RepoName is the GitHub repository name (for github_release type).

asset.description: Asset is the name of the asset to download (for github_release type).

url.description: URL is the direct URL to download the file (for http type).

DownloadedFile.description: DownloadedFile represents a file that can be downloaded from various sources.

name.description: Name is the name of the installed file.

src.description: Src is the source path of the file within the package archive.

dir.description: Dir is the directory where the file should be installed.

link.description: Link is the relative path from Src to the link target.

hard.description: Hard indicates whether to create a hard link instead of a symbolic link.

File.description: File represents a file to be installed from a package.

goos.description: GOOS specifies the target operating system for this format override.

format.description: Format specifies the archive format to use for this operating system.

FormatOverride.description: FormatOverride allows specifying different archive formats for specific operating systems.

FormatOverrides.description: FormatOverrides is a slice of platform-specific format overrides.

enabled.description: Enabled controls whether GitHub artifact attestation verification is active.

predicate_type.description: PredicateType specifies the type of predicate to verify.

signer_workflow.description:
SignerWorkflow2 specifies the expected GitHub Actions workflow for signing.
See https://github.com/aquaproj/aqua/issues/3581

GitHubArtifactAttestations.description: GitHubArtifactAttestations defines configuration for GitHub artifact attestation verification.

enabled.description: Enabled controls whether Minisign verification is active.

type.description: Type specifies where to download the signature file from.

repo_owner.description: RepoOwner is the GitHub repository owner (for github_release type).

repo_name.description: RepoName is the GitHub repository name (for github_release type).

asset.description: Asset is the name of the signature file asset (for github_release type).

url.description: URL is the direct URL to the signature file (for http type).

public_key.description: PublicKey is the base64-encoded public key for verification.

Minisign.description: Minisign defines configuration for verifying packages using Minisign signature verification.

Override.description: Override provides platform-specific package configuration that overrides the default settings when the specified OS/architecture conditions are met.

Overrides.description: Overrides is a slice of platform-specific configuration overrides.

PackageInfo.description: PackageInfo represents a complete package definition including metadata, installation configuration, verification settings, and platform support.

PackageInfos.description: PackageInfos represents a slice of package information.

enabled.description: Enabled controls whether SLSA provenance verification is active.

type.description: Type specifies where to download the provenance file from.

repo_owner.description: RepoOwner is the GitHub repository owner (for github_release type).

repo_name.description: RepoName is the GitHub repository name (for github_release type).

asset.description: Asset is the name of the provenance file asset (for github_release type).

url.description: URL is the direct URL to the provenance file (for http type).

source_uri.description: SourceURI is the expected source repository URI for verification.

source_tag.description: SourceTag is the expected source tag for verification.

SLSAProvenance.description: SLSAProvenance defines configuration for SLSA (Supply-chain Levels for Software Artifacts) provenance verification.

name.description: Name is the variable name used in templates.

required.description: Required indicates whether this variable must be provided.

default.description: Default is the default value used when the variable is not provided.

Var.description: Var represents a template variable that can be used in package configurations to customize installation behavior based on runtime values.

Variant.description: Variant represents an additional matching condition for an Override beyond the standard goos/goarch axis.

Variants.description: Variants is a list of Variant conditions that must all match for the containing Override to apply.

VersionOverride.description: VersionOverride allows different package configurations for specific version ranges.
